Join the team!

Check out our job and internship offers.










Job offers






  FLE/FLS Teachers

Teachers: We are always looking for individuals available on Saturdays and weekday evenings to teach classes.


If you have a valid work permit, permanent residency, or Canadian citizenship and experience teaching French as a Foreign or Second Language (FLE/FSL), we would love to hear from you!
Please send your CV, cover letter, and a letter of recommendation by email to our Educational Director, at  ecole@afedmonton.ca. (Only candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.)












Learn French in your city

 10424 123 St, T5N 1N7

Land acknowledgement

The Alliance Française of Edmonton respectfully acknowleges that we are situated on Treaty 6 territory, traditional lands of First Nations and Métis people.
